name: Señor Frijol
overview: Señor Frijol is some guy who’s out there finding his way. And he‘s got a lot to say, even if half the time it doesn't make sense. Discover the rest of his journey, from a job interview at a missing company to a business idea that promises to take him far. Because once you have the nerve to accept that you're a grown up, there's no turning back.
